name: gabe-suite
description: Development suite for Claude Code. Skills, commands, and hooks for understanding, reviewing, deciding, and shipping — with a knowledge system (KDBP, the Khujta Deep Behavioural Protocol) that tracks values, decisions, and deferred work across sessions. Contains the /gabe-lens cognitive-translation skill plus /gabe-roast, /gabe-myopic, /gabe-review, /gabe-align, /gabe-assess, /gabe-health, /gabe-help, /gabe-docs, /gabe-docsite, /gabe-plan, /gabe-execute, /gabe-commit, /gabe-push, /gabe-teach, /gabe-scope.
